task.title: Fix layout shift during auth loading
task.description: Update ConditionalLayout to always render the sidebar/bottombar placeholders and flex-1 wrapper during auth pending state, preventing the full-width-to-constrained layout shift on page refresh.
task.details: - Change the `isPending || !session` early return to render layout shell placeholders - Sidebar placeholder: `hidden md:flex` div matching Sidebar's `w-56`, `bg-background`, `border-r border-secondary-700` - Bottombar placeholder: `md:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-14`, `bg-background`, `border-t-2 border-secondary-700` - Always wrap children in `div className="flex-1 overflow-auto"`

task.title: Add loading skeleton to ExpenseTable
task.description: Add a loading guard to ExpenseTable matching the pattern used by IncomeTable and TransferTable, so all three tables show a skeleton while reference data loads.
task.details: - Import `SkeletonTable` from `@/components/shared/SkeletonTable` - Destructure `isLoading` from `useAccountsQuery`, `useCardsQuery`, `useExpenseTypesQuery` - Add `const isLoadingData = accountsLoading || cardsLoading || expenseTypesLoading` - Add early return with `SkeletonTable tableType="expense"` before the main render

task.title: Fix navigation icon pairs
task.description: Swap 5 outline icons to ones that have proper Filled counterparts in @tabler/icons-react, so active/inactive states use the same icon shape.
task.details: - Replace imports: IconSwitchHorizontalâ†’IconReceipt, IconWalletâ†’IconCoin (nav only), IconTrendingUpâ†’IconGraph (nav only), IconArrowsExchangeâ†’IconExchange, IconChartBarâ†’IconReportAnalytics - Update navGroups activity routes and planning routes - Update mobileNavRoutes Transactions entry - Remove unused imports (IconSwitchHorizontal, IconArrowsExchange, IconChartBar â€” verify not used elsewhere) - Keep IconWallet and IconTrendingUp imports ONLY if used elsewhere (they are in icons.tsx, but not imported from navigation.ts there)

task.title: Verify and test
task.description: Run existing tests, lint, and type-check to ensure nothing breaks.
task.details: - Run `npx tsc --noEmit` for type checking - Run lint - Run existing tests for affected components (ConditionalLayout, Sidebar, BottomBar, ExpenseTable)
